name: Stepper

en.when_to_use: Use it when a tutorial, implementation plan, delivery process, or current progress must be explained in a clear order, especially when every step has a title, explanation, and optional code/illustration. If steps may be performed in any order, use a card list; if dependencies must be edited or completion state reported, use a workflow or task component.
en.why_valuable: Long paragraphs hide execution order and the current phase; this template creates a stable reading path with numbered nodes, connecting lines, and done/current/upcoming states, while constraining code and inline images within each step card for clear teaching without external resource dependencies.

data_in.note: data.steps renders in array order; status accepts 'done', 'current', or 'upcoming', with invalid values treated as upcoming. code is placed as plain text in pre and is neither HTML nor executed. image accepts only an inline data URL beginning with data:image/; other URLs are ignored to preserve zero network dependency. imageAlt is alternative text.

schema.title?: string -- step-group title; displays "Step by step" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- short scope description in the title area
schema.steps: {title:string,detail?:string,status?:'done'|'current'|'upcoming',code?:string,image?:string,imageAlt?:string}[] -- ordered steps; image must be a data:image/ data URL

spec.note: Vertical steps grow with content, code blocks can scroll horizontally, and inline images are at most 220px high. No host-size measurement, vh, or percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要把教程、实施计划、交付流程或当前进度按明确顺序讲清楚时用它，尤其适合每步都有标题、解释和可选代码/示意图的回答。若步骤可任意执行，用卡片列表；若要编辑依赖或回传完成状态，应改用工作流或任务组件。
why_valuable: 长段落会掩盖执行顺序和当前阶段；本模板用编号节点、连接线与 done/current/upcoming 状态形成稳定的阅读路径，同时把代码和内联图片约束在单步卡片内，既便于教学也不产生外部资源依赖。

data_in.note: data.steps 按数组顺序渲染；status 接受 'done'、'current'、'upcoming'，非法值按 upcoming。code 作为纯文本放入 pre，不做 HTML 或执行。image 仅接受 data:image/ 开头的内联数据 URL，其他 URL 忽略，以保持零网络依赖；imageAlt 是替代文本。

schema.title?: string —— 步骤组标题；省略时显示 “Step by step”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 标题区的短范围说明
schema.steps: {title:string,detail?:string,status?:'done'|'current'|'upcoming',code?:string,image?:string,imageAlt?:string}[] —— 有序步骤；image 必须是 data:image/ 数据 URL

spec.note: 纵向步骤按内容自动增高，代码块自身可横向滚动，内联图片最高 220px；无宿主尺寸测量、vh 或百分比高度。

example._why: 四步部署指南同时覆盖已完成、当前和后续状态，并包含一段可识别的 shell 命令，能验证连接线、编号语义、状态标签和代码容器。

steps.title: Validate locally
steps.detail: Run the contract tests and inspect the production build before creating a release.
steps.code:
npm run typecheck
npm run build

steps.title: Create a release candidate
steps.detail: Freeze the approved commit and attach the generated changelog.

steps.title: Deploy to staging
steps.detail: Exercise authentication, empty states, and the rollback path with production-like data.

steps.title: Promote and monitor
steps.detail: Roll out gradually, watch error rate and latency, then close the launch checklist.

uplink: none: 纯展示组件；所有悬停、滚动、原生链接或其他局部交互都只发生在自有 shadow 内，不向 AI 或宿主回传数据。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
